questions.html: If coins is greater than or equal to 5, print 'You have enough!', otherwise print 'Not enough coins.'
If health is less than 10, print 'Low health!', otherwise print 'Health is fine.'
If score is equal to 100, print 'Perfect!', otherwise print 'Keep trying.'
If level is greater than 3, print 'Advanced player', otherwise print 'Beginner player.'
If lives is not equal to 0, print 'Still alive!', otherwise print 'Game over.'
If age is less than or equal to 12, print 'Child ticket', otherwise print 'Adult ticket.'
If temperature is greater than 30, print 'Too hot!', otherwise print 'Nice weather.'
If speed is greater than or equal to 100, print 'Too fast!', otherwise print 'Safe speed.'
If attempts is equal to 3, print 'No more tries!', otherwise print 'Try again.'
If battery is less than or equal to 20, print 'Low battery!', otherwise print 'Battery OK.'
If errors is not equal to 0, print 'Fix your code!', otherwise print 'All clear.'
If players is greater than 1, print 'Multiplayer mode!', otherwise print 'Single player mode.'
If fuel is less than 5, print 'Low fuel!', otherwise print 'Fuel is fine.'
If rank is equal to 1, print 'You are first place!', otherwise print 'Keep going.'
If time is greater than or equal to 60, print 'Time is up!', otherwise print 'Keep going.'
If stock is less than or equal to 0, print 'Out of stock!', otherwise print 'In stock.'
If password is not equal to 1234, print 'Wrong password!', otherwise print 'Access granted.'
If distance is greater than 100, print 'Long journey!', otherwise print 'Short trip.'
If grade is greater than or equal to 50, print 'You passed!', otherwise print 'You failed.'
If hunger is greater than 7, print 'Time to eat!', otherwise print 'Not hungry yet.'
